title: Virtual Machine Provisioning Algorithm
description: Algorithm for provisioning VMs based on resource requirements
code:
PROCEDURE ProvisionVM(resourceRequirements)
BEGIN
 FOR each host IN availableHosts:
 IF CheckResources(host, resourceRequirements) THEN
 IF CheckCompatibility(host, VMType) THEN
 AllocateResources(host, resourceRequirements)
 CreateVMImage(host)
 StartVM()
 RETURN success
 END IF
 END IF
 END FOR
 RETURN failure - No suitable host
END

FUNCTION CheckResources(host, requirements)
BEGIN
 availableCPU = host.totalCPU - host.usedCPU
 availableRAM = host.totalRAM - host.usedRAM
 availableDisk = host.totalDisk - host.usedDisk
 
 RETURN (availableCPU >= requirements.minCPU AND
 availableRAM >= requirements.minRAM AND
 availableDisk >= requirements.minDisk)
END
explanation: This algorithm selects a suitable host server for provisioning a new VM by checking resource availability and compatibility.

complexity.time: O(n) where n is number of hosts

title: Cloud Auto-Scaling Algorithm
description: Algorithm for elastic scaling based on workload
code:
PROCEDURE AutoScale(metrics, thresholds)
BEGIN
 avgCPU = CalculateAverage(metrics.cpuUsage)
 avgMemory = CalculateAverage(metrics.memoryUsage)
 currentInstances = metrics.activeInstances
 
 IF avgCPU > thresholds.upperThreshold THEN
 // Scale out
 newInstances = currentInstances + 1
 LaunchInstances(newInstances)
 UpdateLoadBalancer()
 ELSE IF avgCPU < thresholds.lowerThreshold THEN
 // Scale in
 IF currentInstances > thresholds.minInstances THEN
 newInstances = currentInstances - 1
 TerminateInstances(newInstances)
 UpdateLoadBalancer()
 END IF
 END IF
 
 RETURN scalingAction
END
explanation: This algorithm monitors CPU usage and automatically adds or removes instances to handle demand fluctuations, ensuring cost efficiency.

title: Hypervisor Resource Scheduler
description: CPU scheduling algorithm for multiple VMs on a hypervisor
code:
PROCEDURE ScheduleVMs(vmQueue, availableCPUs)
BEGIN
 readyQueue = SortByPriority(vmQueue)
 timeSlice = DEFAULT_TIME_SLICE
 
 FOR each vm IN readyQueue:
 IF vm.remainingTime > 0 THEN
 // Allocate CPU to VM
 ExecuteVM(vm, timeSlice)
 vm.remainingTime = vm.remainingTime - timeSlice
 
 // Check for preemption
 IF vm.remainingTime > 0 THEN
 AddToQueue(vm)
 ELSE
 ReleaseResources(vm)
 END IF
 END IF
 END FOR
 
 RETURN scheduleComplete
END
explanation: This algorithm implements CPU scheduling for VMs, allocating CPU time slices based on priority and ensuring fair sharing of physical CPU resources.
